title: Project Extinction Datapack
description: Extends the abilities of the Project Extinction resource pack.
body:
# This data pack is designed to be used with the Project Extinction resource pack in order to extend the functionality of the pack.

**Project Extinction currently has these features accessible through the data pack:**

**Dinosaur Changes:**
- All dinosaurs now have custom sizes once spawned
- Dinosaurs now have custom item drops
- Some dinosaurs have custom walking speeds, health, etc.
- 
**Custom Recipes:**
- Weapons and tools crafted from dinosaur-related items
- Custom foods to extend Minecraft's food system
- 
**Advancements:**
- A full advancement tree designed to guide the player through Project Extinction's features and story
- 
**Custom Items:**
- Banner patterns
- Paintings
- Music discs
- 
**Structures:**
- Ancient Digsite
- Time Machine
